SEARCH
程序包 TAUI

类 TAController

java.lang.Object
TAUI.TAController
public class TAController extends Object
Control Class: TA Controller Handles the core business logic, data routing, and persistence (mock database) for the Teaching Assistant application system. It acts as the central hub between UI components and the underlying data entities. * @version 2.0 (Updated with US-07 and US-08 Application Management Architecture)

  • 构造器概要

    构造器
    构造器
    说明
    TAController()
    Default constructor.

  • 构造器详细资料

    • TAController

      public TAController()
      Default constructor. Initializes the data structures and populates the system with mock job data for demonstration purposes.

  • 方法详细资料

    • getAllJobs

      public List<Job> getAllJobs()

    • filterJobs

      public List<Job> filterJobs(String module, String status, String jobType, String skills, String keyword)
      Filters the central job list based on multiple criteria provided by the UI.

    • getUploadedCVs

      public List<CVRecord> getUploadedCVs(String userId)
      Retrieves the CV list for a specific user. Creates an empty list if the user has no uploaded CVs yet to prevent NullPointerExceptions.

    • uploadCV

      public String uploadCV(String userId, File file)

    • deleteCV

      public boolean deleteCV(String userId, CVRecord cvRecord)

    • getUserApplications

      public List<ApplicationRecord> getUserApplications(String userId)
      Retrieves the complete list of job applications for a specific user. Implements defensive programming to guarantee a non-null return value. * @param userId The unique identifier of the applicant.
      返回:
      A List containing all ApplicationRecords for the user.

    • submitApplication

      public boolean submitApplication(Job targetJob, String userId, CVRecord selectedCV, String coverLetter)
      Core business logic to process and persist a new job application. Validates input, prevents duplicates, and records the transaction. * @param targetJob The Job entity being applied to.
      参数:
      userId - The unique ID of the user submitting the application.
      selectedCV - The specific CVRecord chosen for this application.
      coverLetter - The submitted cover letter text (can be empty).
      返回:
      boolean True if the submission was successful, false otherwise.

    • withdrawApplication

      public boolean withdrawApplication(ApplicationRecord record)
      [Feature US-07]: Withdraw Application Logic Processes the withdrawal request for a specific application record. Implements status constraints to prevent withdrawing applications that are already finalized (e.g., Hired, Rejected) or already withdrawn. * @param record The ApplicationRecord to be withdrawn.
      返回:
      boolean True if withdrawal was successful, false if constrained or null.
